name: turafic-auto-updater
description: TURAFIC 자동 업데이트 시스템 - 1000대 PC에 한 번만 배포

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:worker && npm run build:launcher
scripts.build:exe: npm run build && pkg auto-updater.js -t node18-win-x64 -o turafic-updater.exe
scripts.build:launcher-exe: npm run build:launcher && pkg dist/launcher.js -t node18-win-x64 -o turafic-launcher.exe
scripts.build:launcher-exe-dev: npm run build:launcher-dev && pkg dist/launcher-dev.js -t node18-win-x64 -o turafic-launcher-dev.exe
scripts.build:test-launcher-exe: npm run build:test-launcher && pkg dist/test-launcher.js -t node18-win-x64 -o test-launcher.exe
scripts.build:test-launcher-deploy: npm run build:test-launcher-exe && node scripts/copy-to-deploy.js test-launcher
scripts.deploy:test-launcher: npm run build:test-launcher-deploy && git add deploy/test-launcher.exe deploy/version.txt && git commit -m "deploy: Update test-launcher" && git push
scripts.build:app-launcher-exe: npm run build:app-launcher && pkg dist/app-launcher.js -t node18-win-x64 -o app-launcher.exe
scripts.build:launcher-vm-exe: npm run build:launcher-vm && pkg dist/launcher-vm.js -t node18-win-x64 -o turafic-launcher-vm.exe
scripts.build:launcher-normal-exe: npm run build:launcher-normal && pkg dist/launcher-normal.js -t node18-win-x64 -o turafic-launcher-normal.exe
scripts.build:all-exe: npm run build:launcher-exe && npm run build:launcher-exe-dev
scripts.build:launchers-all: npm run build:launcher-vm-exe && npm run build:launcher-normal-exe
